name: Converters & Generators
description: Client-side data converters and utility generators for developers, students, and everyday users.

tools.name: JSON to CSV Converter
tools.description: Convert JSON arrays/objects into downloadable CSV.

tools.name: CSV to JSON Converter
tools.description: Parse CSV into structured JSON with header mapping.

tools.name: JSON Formatter / Beautifier
tools.description: Pretty-print, minify, and validate JSON with tree view.

tools.name: JSON to YAML Converter
tools.description: Convert between JSON and YAML formats.

tools.name: XML to JSON Converter
tools.description: Parse XML into JSON and back.

tools.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
tools.description: Encode and decode text and files to/from Base64.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Generate downloadable QR codes for URLs, text, and contacts.

tools.name: Barcode Generator
tools.description: Create barcodes in formats like Code128, EAN, and UPC.

tools.name: UUID / GUID Generator
tools.description: Generate v4 (and v1) UUIDs in bulk.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Create strong random passwords with custom rules.

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate placeholder text by words, sentences, or paragraphs.

tools.name: Hash Generator (MD5 / SHA)
tools.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hashes of text.

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.description: Convert text between upper, lower, title, camel, and snake case.

tools.name: Unix Timestamp Converter
tools.description: Convert between Unix epoch and human-readable dates.

tools.name: JSON to XML Converter
tools.description: Convert JSON data structures into XML.

tools.name: HTML to Markdown Converter
tools.description: Convert HTML markup into clean Markdown.

tools.name: Markdown to HTML Converter
tools.description: Render Markdown into HTML with live preview.

tools.name: Color Converter (HEX / RGB / HSL)
tools.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV.

tools.name: Number Base Converter
tools.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hex.

tools.name: Random Number Generator
tools.description: Generate random numbers within a custom range.

tools.name: Regex Tester
tools.description: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting.

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode JWT header and payload and show claims.

tools.name: CSV to TSV Converter
tools.description: Convert CSV to TSV and Excel-friendly formats.

tools.name: SQL to JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert SQL INSERT statements into JSON or CSV.

tools.name: Text to Slug Generator
tools.description: Turn any text into a URL-safe slug.

tools.name: Random String Generator
tools.description: Generate random strings and API tokens with custom charsets.

tools.name: JSON to TypeScript
tools.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces from a JSON sample.

tools.name: Cron Expression Generator
tools.description: Build and explain cron schedules in plain English.

tools.name: List Randomizer
tools.description: Shuffle or pick random items from a pasted list.

tools.name: Code Minifier
tools.description: Minify HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to reduce file size.

tools.name: Invoice Generator
tools.description: Create professional PDF invoices with line items, tax, and instant download — no watermark.

tools.name: IBAN Validator
tools.description: Validate IBAN numbers for Pakistan, EU, UK and 80+ countries with mod-97 checksum.
